biological_replicate: human OA cartilage explants from the Clatterbridge hospital following knee arthroplasty procedures with informed patient consent
technical_replicate: the samples were analyzed in triplicate injections
experimental_design: ADAMTS4 activity in human OA cartilage
we tested its ability to inhibit the generation of neoepitope QQS77 in human knee OA cartilage explants
factor_value: ADAMTS4 COMPase activity requires its spacer domain
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
